rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TONY GREGORY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) the initial hearing date on this petition was 4/3/18. It has since been continued twice as no notice of hearing was filed and no proposed order was submitted (issues were cited in the tentative rulings). Still, nothing has been filed or provided; 2) Petitioner requested administration to continue to 5/1/18, which is the date of the current hearing. A new petition for approval of status of administration will be needed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NICHOLAS GEORGE VIDAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner alleges that rental income and real property expenses were not received by Petitioner, but received and paid by Richard F. Ragan, as the nominated personal representative of the estate of Anthony Vidak, the sole beneficiary of this estate, who was only recently appointed executor on 2/6/18. A further declaration has been filed by Petitioner's attorney on 4/20/18; 2) a waiver of accounting was filed by Richard Ragan, but prior to his appointment as personal representative. The hearing was continued twice for a new waiver to be signed, but no additional filing has been made.
